title: Doner Kebab : Salad Tomatoes Onions
description: Go to the other side of the counter with Doner Kebab. Take control of your restaurant and make a maximum of meal as fast as you can while following your clients's demands in this arcade-like game.
instructions: You are finally your own boss and you own your restaurant but now you must do better Prepare as much meal as you can for your clients with the good ingredients Finish each level to earn stars get more ingredients and become the king of kebab
